title: Online Education Marketing Specialist
description:
Pickering Global Campus is the online learning platform, part of the SagePaths Group. We deliver accessible, high-quality academic and professional programmes designed for learners across Asia and beyond. As we continue expanding our digital education offerings, we are building a dedicated team to drive online growth, brand visibility, and student acquisition. This role is ideal for an individual who thrives in a start-up-style environment—resourceful, hands-on, adaptable—yet appreciates the structure and support of a well-established organisation.

If you want to play a pivotal role in shaping a new digital learning initiative, this is your opportunity.

Role Brief

We are seeking a dynamic and ambitious Online Education Marketing Specialist to lead Pickering Global Campus’ digital presence, growth initiatives, and student recruitment strategy. You will design and execute marketing campaigns from scratch, experiment with new tactics, analyse performance, and directly influence PGC’s overall marketing roadmap. This role requires creativity, data-driven thinking, and ownership of the full digital funnel.

Key Responsibilities

Digital Strategy & Campaign Execution

  • Develop and execute digital marketing strategies to grow brand awareness, leads, and online enrolments.

  • Create multi-channel content and campaigns (email, social media, paid ads, landing pages) tailored to target audiences.

  • Maximise use of CRM and automation tools (e.g., HubSpot/Brevo) for email marketing and behavioural journeys.

Growth & Performance Marketing

  • Run growth experiments such as A/B testing, landing page optimisation, and lead magnets to achieve rapid, measurable results.

  • Monitor and analyse campaign performance using Google Analytics, HubSpot, and internal dashboards.

  • Adapt strategies based on data insights to continually improve ROI and conversion rates.

  • Content, Brand & Web

  • Manage website content and ensure alignment with PGC’s brand direction.

  • Collaborate with internal teams and freelancers (design, content, sales) to ensure cohesive and impactful messaging.

  • Guide social media content planning alongside Brands & Communications for consistent digital presence.

Market Research & Strategy Development

  • Conduct market and competitor research to identify new opportunities and emerging trends.

  • Contribute to shaping PGC’s marketing roadmap and prioritise high-impact initiatives.

  • Support the development of new programmes by providing audience insights and demand analysis.

Agile Collaboration

  • Work closely with Product, Tech, and Sales teams to ensure marketing initiatives support the learner journey and platform features.

  • Adjust campaigns quickly in response to performance data and operational needs.

  • Take initiative and operate independently in a fast-paced, start-up-like environment.

Requirements

  • Minimum Bachelor degree with 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or performance marketing.

  • Strong understanding of digital fundamentals: SEO, PPC, social media, content marketing, email marketing, and funnel optimisation.

  • Comfortable with analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, Meta Ads Manager, etc.).

  • Creative problem-solver with a willingness to test new ideas and iterate rapidly.

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills; attention to detail is essential.

  • Ability to work independently and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial environment.

  • Advantageous: Experience building/launching new online products, start-up experience, EdTech or education industry exposure.

postedCompany.description: Pickering Institute is a registered private education institution offering the Pathway and Academic Porgramme. We specialise in education in the fields of sustainable development and social sciences, aiming to cultivate students' comprehensive abilities. Through our diverse range of courses, students acquire a solid foundation of knowledge and skills to prepare them for their future careers. At Pickering Institute, we prioritise academic excellence and holistic development, providing students with a high-quality educational experience to empower them to become future leaders and catalysts of change.
postedCompany.name: PICKERING INSTITUTE PTE. LTD.
